mapper.sql: device_id, user_id, platform, push_provider, provider_client_id, app_version, os_version, device_model, device_status, registered_at, last_active_at, unbound_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bluenote_push.push_device ( device_id, user_id, platform, push_provider, provider_client_id, app_version, os_version, device_model, device_status, registered_at, last_active_at, unbound_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{userId}, #{platform}, #{pushProvider}, #{providerClientId}, #{appVersion}, #{osVersion}, #{deviceModel}, #{deviceStatus}, #{registeredAt}, #{lastActiveAt}, #{unboundAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = VALUES(user_id), platform = VALUES(platform), push_provider = VALUES(push_provider), provider_client_id = VALUES(provider_client_id), app_version = VALUES(app_version), os_version = VALUES(os_version), device_model = VALUES(device_model), device_status = VALUES(device_status), last_active_at = VALUES(last_active_at), unbound_at = VALUES(unbound_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bluenote_push.push_device WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY last_active_at DESC
SELECT FROM bluenote_push.push_device WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND device_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY last_active_at DESC
